## Summary

Describe the user-visible outcome and why the change is needed.

## Verification

- [ ] Release build succeeds.
- [ ] Relevant isolated tests pass.
- [ ] New behavior has tests.
- [ ] I reviewed the diff for secrets, personal paths, private data, debug artifacts, and unrelated changes.
- [ ] I did not weaken loopback, stdio, approval, size, timeout, configuration, ownership, or uninstall controls.
- [ ] Dependency/license changes are documented and pinned.

## Security and privacy impact

Describe changes to network destinations, supplied text, local files, process control, environment variables, installer/update behavior, or resource use. Write "none" only after checking.
